name: Mendelson Infrastructures & Industries Ltd.
summary: Mendelson Infrastructures & Industries Ltd. engages in the marketing and supply of fluid conveyance equipment in Israel. It offers pipes and piping accessories comprising multi-layer piping, PEX piping, copper piping, polyroll piping, multigol piping, and accessories; and fire extinguishing products, including sprinklers and alarm check valves, grooved butterfly and check valves , flow sensors, test and drain valves, galvanized grooved connectors, hanging accessories, gate valves, fire-extinguishing cannons, double-winged check valves, and fire-extinguishing pumps. The company also provides industrial products, which include gates, valves, low and high pressure piping and accessories, pneumatic and electric adapter, and command and control systems; infrastructure products comprising wedge valves, check valves, filters, butterfly valves, flanges, piping accessories, adapters, knife valves, and check adapters. In addition, it also offers sanitation products comprising toilet bowls, bathroom sinks, kitchen sinks and taps, shower taps, concealed cisterns, visible cisterns, bathroom cabinets, bathroom accessories, and shower stalls; and offers various pumping products. The company is based in Kiryat Ata, Israel.
